allow: Bash(python -c "import gradio; print\(gradio.__version__\); import inspect; print\([p for p in inspect.signature\(gradio.Audio.__init__\).parameters]\)")
Bash(.venvScriptspython -c "import gradio; print\(gradio.__version__\); import inspect; print\([p for p in inspect.signature\(gradio.Audio.__init__\).parameters]\)")
Bash(".venv/Scripts/python" -c "import gradio; print\(gradio.__version__\); import inspect; print\([p for p in inspect.signature\(gradio.Audio.__init__\).parameters]\)")
